title: Multi-functional Digital Kitchen Timer - ABS material, loud alarm, large numbers, cooking timer, convenient storage, back with plastic magnetic heel stand (white)
features: Reliable and efficient: our digital kitchen timer is designed to accurately time your cooking and baking needs, ensuring perfect results every time!
Versatility: The timer features multiple countdown and forward timers, perfect for timing a variety of kitchen tasks such as cooking, baking and brewing.
Durable ABS material: this timer is made of high quality ABS material, durable enough to withstand daily use in the kitchen (batteries not included)

Loud alarm and clear display: the timer is equipped with a loud and clear alarm to ensure you don't miss any important timings, even from a distance, and a large digital display to make the countdown time clear at a glance.
Convenient and portable: the rear stand and plastic magnetic design can be easily placed on any surface or attached to metal objects for easy storage and use in any kitchen
description: Product Description Multi-functional Digital Kitchen Timer Precision Timing, Unmatched Versatility Master your kitchen, classroom, and workouts with one powerful tool. Features a large, easy-read screen and flexible magnetic backing. Switch between positive timing and countdown modes to fit any environment. Memory Function :After the countdown rings, pressing START/STOP will automatically restore your last setting for quick and easy resetting. Fast Forward :After holding down MIN or SEC 3 seconds, the numbers will automatically fast forward in minutes or seconds respectively,saving you valuable seconds.(Maximum setting of 99min and 99sec) ON/OFF :There is a timer switch on the right side of the digital timer, which is turned on when it is up and off when it is down. You can turn off the timer when not in use to save power. (Please remove the battery if not in use for a long time) Strong Magnetic :The back of the digital timer has strong magnetic, which can easily attach the digital timer to metal surfaces such as refrigerators. Large Screen :This visual timer features a large screen and large numbers, which can be clearly seen from multiple angles. Simple to Use Press the START/STOP button to start the countdown; After setting the time by pressing MIN and SEC, press the START/STOP button to start the countdown, press the START/STOP button again to stop the alarm sound；Press MIN and SEC simultaneously to clear the data. And our shell is printed with an instruction manual,too. If you don't understand, please feel free to consult at any time. One Timer, A World of Enjoyment The Perfect Kitchen Companion: Kitchen timers for cooking ensure perfectly cooked meals every time as your essential cooking and egg timer. The Classroom & Homework Aid: Visual timer boost productivity for teachers and help student focus during study time. The Fitness & Habit Builder: Track workout intervals and make brushing teeth fun for kids with the countdown timer.
